heading: Definitions
label: 430f–7 Definitions
notes: Amendments2007—Par. (1). substituted “304A/80009, and dated April 2007” for “304/80,007, and dated October 1998”.Pub. L. 110–161
amendments: Amendments2007—Par. (1). substituted “304A/80009, and dated April 2007” for “304/80,007, and dated October 1998”.Pub. L. 110–161

children.heading: Map
children.label: 1 Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Park Boundary-Corinth Unit”, numbered 304A/80009, and dated April 2007.

children.heading: Park
children.label: 2 Park
children.text: The term “Park” means the Shiloh National Military Park.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: Unit
children.label: 4 Unit
children.text: The term “Unit” means the Corinth Unit of Shiloh National Military Park established under .section 430f–8 of this title
